C

clear() - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Clear the content of the model.
countArticles() - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Return the count of all articles, excluding the XMLRedirect and template articles.
countElements() - Method in interface org.docgene.model.ParagraphElementParent
Count the number of children elements.
createArticle(String) - Method in class org.docgene.parser.HookContext
Create an article.
createArticle(String, String) - Method in class org.docgene.parser.HookContext
Create an article.
createArticle(String, String, boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.parser.HookContext
Create an article.
createArticles() - Method in interface org.docgene.plugins.ElementHook
Create articles.
CustomProperties - Interface in org.docgene.plugins
This class hold custom properties which can be used on command-line or the configuration file.
